description_long: This is a rectangular, military green metal toolbox with a weathered and slightly rusted finish, featuring a large, angular folding handle on top for easy carrying. The front face displays a subtle fleur-de-lis emblem on the left and a small, central latch for securing the lid. The surface shows signs of wear, including scratches, chipped paint, and rust spots, suggesting frequent use or exposure to the elements. The box has a single main compartment, as indicated by the simple, unbroken lid and lack of visible external drawers or trays. The handle is robust and geometric, designed to fold down flat against the lid when not in use. The overall construction appears sturdy, suitable for holding tools or small equipment in urban or industrial environments.
description: A weathered green metal toolbox with a folding handle, central latch, and a fleur-de-lis emblem on the front. The surface is worn and rusted, indicating heavy use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the angular folding handle and the sloped lid, with visible wear and rust spots.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the fleur-de-lis emblem, central latch, and the main access panel of the toolbox.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the handle and lid with additional paint chipping and rust.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying a plain, unadorned back panel and the full width of the handle.
attribute_handle_type: A single, large, angular folding handle made of metal, rectangular in cross-section, designed to pivot down flat against the lid; no visible ergonomic padding.
attribute_latch_mechanism: A small, central metal clasp latch, padlock-compatible, with a simple flip mechanism; no keyhole or combination lock visible.
attribute_brand_logo: A fleur-de-lis emblem is visible on the front left side; no readable text or brand name present.
attribute_compartment_configuration: Single large internal compartment implied by the unbroken lid; no visible trays, drawers, or dividers.
